title: ctenopterella cornigera
intro: Ctenopterella cornigera, also known as the Horn-Headed Fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ctenopterella cornigera include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine, where it is dried and made into teas, infusions, or applied topically in the form of a poultice.
